programme.title: World's Greatest: Global Cities
programme.desc: Travel to the centers of wealth, power, industry, and innovation. From London to Tokyo, Hong Kong to New York, these are the cities that never sleep. The influence held in these economic hubs unites the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Forest Animals
programme.desc: Forest Animals gets up close with bears, koalas, moose, wolves, weaver ants, and Tasmanian Devils. This episode roves dark forests floors and soars above vast canopies of green in America, China, Laos, and Australia.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Cruises
programme.desc: There is something seductive about setting sail. Cruises offer us a chance to dip our toes into the 70% of our planet awash with oceans, rivers, and lakes, exploring places that can only be reached by daring to leave the shore.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Lost Cities
programme.desc: Once powerful and populous centers of influence, these lost cities are providing clues to how our ancestors existed in the world and remind us that ancient civilizations were not so far removed from our own.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Nearshore Islands
programme.desc: Some of the world’s greatest islands are so close that they blend in with the mainland. But regardless of their size and origins, they are often the islands we are drawn to the most, each forging their own unique identity.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Capital Cities
programme.desc: With visionaries, politicians, and activists, these metropolises are defined as the official seats of government. Dublin, Washington, and Taipei share broad avenues, museums, and monuments, but are as varied as the countries they represent.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Marine Animals
programme.desc: From the surprises of colorful reef characters to effervescent penguins, killer sharks, and regal whales, dive into the places where nature reveals itself in some of its most marvelous and bizarre forms.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Arks
programme.desc: Cut off from continents, remote islands have become floating arks, attracting migrating species and forging new ones. Take a privileged glimpse into the secret lives of the rare and exotic species that inhabit these lost worlds.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Treks
programme.desc: Every journey made by foot promises a grand adventure. From the highest mountains to the wildest jungle realms, treks venture down the road less travelled, allowing us to connect to nature, history, and culture, one step at a time.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Nations
programme.desc: Though many are small in stature, they have punched well above their weight on the global stage. Some are rooted in ancient history, while others are only just beginning to realize their full potential.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Rivers
programme.desc: Rivers flow freely - beautiful and powerful waterways that underscore the melody of life. As they meander through the landscape, they shape it, wearing down ranges and deepening valleys, eventually flowing out into the sea.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Volcanic Islands
programme.desc: They've been worshiped and feared over the millennia. But in the wake of drama and destruction, the elements give rise to cultures and nations so beautiful that we've come to know them as the world's greatest volcanic islands.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Bridges
programme.desc: A bridge is a structure that’s designed to transcend, but a great bridge can define the place where it stands. Symbols of human ingenuity, beauty, and grandeur, bridges connect us not only to each other but also to the past.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Flights
programme.desc: Our experience of the world’s greatest marvels is literally and figuratively elevated when we explore them from the air. Whether you travel by air balloon, helicopter, light aircraft, a grand perspective is always guaranteed.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Port Cities
programme.desc: Some of the most stunning cities are port cities - Sydney, Rio, Cape Town - and are also some of the most culturally diverse and vibrant. The great maritime cities of the world bridge countries and continents and unite the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Glaciers
programme.desc: Clinging to the world’s highest mountains and forming ice caps on both poles, glaciers leave an impression on the landscape and on all who bear witness to their splendor.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Monuments & Landmarks
programme.desc: Many of the world’s most significant manmade wonders serve not as dwellings, but as powerful signposts. But more than giving us direction, they tell us a story - they characterize powerful forces, or commemorate power lost.

programme.title: Arthur: Sleep No More/Pet Peeved
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that Pizza Paula's all-you-can-eat contest is his destiny. But how can he possibly win such an important contest without any sleep? Binky volunteers to look after Francine's cat, Nemo, for the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur: War of the Worms/I Owe You One
programme.desc: Brain is always taking the fun out of Fern's storytelling by correcting her facts, but things gets out of hand when Fern tricks him with a fake story! Buster is always asking for favors. Will he learn the real meaning of friendship?
programme.sub-title: War of the Worms/I Owe You One

programme.title: Arthur: Pick a Car, Any Car/Jenna's Bedtime Blues
programme.desc: The family car is broken, and so is Arthur's heart. How can Mom and Dad even think of replacing it? It’s Muffy's annual slumber party, and Jenna is finally invited! But what if the other girls discover that she's an occasional bed-wetter?
programme.sub-title: Pick a Car, Any Car/Jenna's Bedtime Blues

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella Sees the Light/Return of the Snowball
programme.desc: For her sleepover with Marina, Prunella redecorates her room. But Marina is blind--will the decorations she can't see offend her, or worse, make her trip? D.W. has been trying to solve the mystery of her snowball's disappearance.
programme.sub-title: Prunella Sees the Light/Return of the Snowball

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Snow Biz/Bugged
programme.desc: Winter hits Elwood City and Arthur sees dollar signs! His snow-shoveling business is booming--that is, until Buster decides to get in on the action. And, Brain can be a know-it-all, and sometimes he really bugs people.

programme.title: Arthur: Follow the Bouncing Ball/Buster Baxter and the Letter from the Sea
programme.desc: Alberto Molina's beloved soccer ball--signed by his favorite Ecuadorian soccer star --is lost! While on vacation, Buster discovers a message in a bottle on the shore. Could it be a message from the people of the lost city of Atlantis?
programme.sub-title: Follow the Bouncing Ball/Buster Baxter and the Letter from the Sea

programme.title: Arthur: The Hallway Minotaur/Ladonna's Like List
programme.desc: Attention Lakewood Elementary! There's a new sheriff—er--hallway monitor-in town, and his name is George Lundgren. Ladonna Compson is friendly, funny, and full of personality. Everyone likes her! At least, that's what she thought.

programme.title: Arthur: Phony Fern/Brain's Shocking Secret
programme.desc: When Fern's parents give her a cell phone for emergencies, she soon becomes hooked on it. Brain is the smartest kid in class. Everyone knows that! What they don't know is that he was kept back in Kindergarten. Will Binky spill the beans?

programme.title: Arthur: The Butler Did...What?/The Trouble with Trophies
programme.desc: Bailey is missing! Muffy discovers a series of clues and is left wondering, who exactly IS Bailey? Then, everyone loves getting trophies, right? It turns out that Fern could not care less about them.
programme.sub-title: The Butler Did...What?/The Trouble with Trophies

programme.title: Arthur's First Day
programme.desc: It's finally the first day of fourth grade and Arthur couldn't be more excited - until he learns Buster is in another class! Meanwhile, D.W. is nervous for her first day of kindergarten. Will Arthur and D.W. be able to make new friends?

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Rules/Meet Binky
programme.desc: Writing your own name in graffiti all over the school wouldn't be very smart, right? Binky says he didn't do it, so detectives Fern and Buster are on the case. Then, Binky is the newest, hottest, hippest pop music craze in Elwood City.

programme.title: Arthur: Cents-less/Buster the Lounge Lizard
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn decides it's time for his class to learn a little about money. For the entire weekend, no one in the class can spend a cent. Buster has the brand-new Dark Bunny Dark Buggy, complete with grappling hook and voice commands!

programme.title: Arthur: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry
programme.desc: Prunella's loves doing yoga with her mom, but when her best friend joins them, will she be able to share her time? When Arthur decides to take on The Brain at a checkers competition, everyone rallies behind the underdog.
programme.sub-title: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker
programme.desc: After the Tibbles get a set of drums to play at the music festival, D.W. is determined to get an even bigger and louder one. Then, Buster is always telling the most incredible stories, but now he claims there is a tiger in the state forest.
programme.sub-title: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: There is a virus spreading through Lakewood Elementary--it’s new nicknames and it’s changing how everyone treats each other! The playground has been quiet lately--too quiet--and the Tough Customers don't like it one bit.
programme.sub-title: Nicked by a Name/The Play's the Thing

programme.title: Arthur: Kids Are From Earth, Parents Are From Pluto/Nerves Of Steal
programme.desc: It’s Lakewood Elementary Parents Open House! How will the kids survive a whole evening of their parents' embarrassing antics? Buster is the only kid in Elwood City who doesn't have a Cybertoy, so he decides to 'borrow' one from the store.
programme.sub-title: Kids Are From Earth, Parents Are From Pluto/Nerves Of Steal

programme.title: Arthur: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.
programme.sub-title: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Library Card/Arthur's Big Hit
programme.desc: When D.W. discovers that she can get her own library card, she rejoices at the world of books waiting for her. And, is it ever okay to hit someone? Sometimes you just get so mad, you wanna....pow! Right??

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Babysits/Arthur's Cousin Catastrophe
programme.desc: You think running a marathon is hard? Try babysitting for the Terrible Tibble Twins. Next, Arthur's family is hosting the once-a-year-is-more-than-enough family reunion. But a major thunderstorm turns this into a reunion to remember.

programme.title: Arthur: April 9th
programme.desc: April 9th is a normal day until a fire destroys the teacher's lounge and forces Lakewood Elementary to close. This unexpected event finds creates a wide range of emotional reactions, for Arthur, his friends and teachers, and the community.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., All Fired Up/I'd Rather Read It Myself
programme.desc: When Ms. Morgan announces they'll be having a fire drill during preschool, D.W. wants no part of it--it sounds way too scary. Then, the Tibble Twins are better than D.W. at just about everything.
programme.sub-title: D.W., All Fired Up/I'd Rather Read It Myself

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!
programme.sub-title: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat

programme.title: Arthur: Caught in the Crosswires/Framed
programme.desc: Muffy is thrilled when mega producer J3 chooses her family for his latest reality TV project. After all, she was born to be star! Buster has just won the best young artist award at the Elwood City Arts Festival.

programme.title: Arthur: The "A" Team/Emily Swallows a Horse
programme.desc: Francine and Brain are the best players on the soccer team, and they wish their teammates could take the game a bit more seriously. And then Emily really wants the sparkly ball D.W. just found, so she tells a little white lie about it.

programme.title: Arthur: My Club Rules/Stolen Bike
programme.desc: The gang can't agree on rules for their club, and each starts his own. Next, Francine's embarrassed by her crummy old bike. Why can't she have a shiny new one like all her friends?

programme.title: Arthur: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing
programme.desc: Carl has agreed to play the accordion for George's puppet show. But his routines are getting in the way of rehearsals. Buster enlists Binky's help to keep him from gorging on delicious Tuvaluna cookies. Will Buster's self-control crumble?
programme.sub-title: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland
programme.desc: Buster receives a box of chocolates in the mail from a secret admirer. It's driving him crazy! Who could possibly like him that much? And James receives a gift from his uncle in Scotland--a toy lamb that will give its owner special powers!
programme.sub-title: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland

programme.title: Arthur: Portrait of the Artist as a Young Tibble/The Secret Guardians
programme.desc: The Tibble Twins start a new business to earn enough money to buy the coveted Krummy Kreepy Kastle. When and friends stumble upon a beautiful woodland oasis right by their homes, they vow to tell no one and keep it as their secret spot.
programme.sub-title: Portrait of the Artist as a Young Tibble/The Secret Guardians

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen's Lost Diary/Arthur's Knee
programme.desc: Poor Sue Ellen has lost the one thing she's never without--her diary. Then, Arthur's hurt his knee but won't tell Mom--because then she'd know he'd been playing down at the dump , where he was NOT allowed to go.

programme.title: Arthur: Double Tibble Trouble/Arthur's Almost Live Not Real Music Festival
programme.desc: Playing with the Tibble twins requires preparation, endurance and earplugs. But when one gets sick, playing with the other should be a lot easier, right? Arthur and the gang create their own music videos.
programme.sub-title: Double Tibble Trouble/Arthur's Almost Live Not Real Music Festival

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!
programme.sub-title: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice

programme.title: Arthur: The Case of the Girl with the Long Face/The Substitute Arthur
programme.desc: Fern's been feeling low and no one can figure out why. Luckily, Buster Baxter is on the case! With Arthur out of town, Buster is on the hunt for a new best friend, but he only wants to play games HIS way. Will Buster learn to compromise?
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Girl with the Long Face/The Substitute Arthur

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Last Stronghold (November 1944)
programme.desc: American B-29 high-altitude bomber attacks Japan near the end of World War II.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Mount Belvedere
programme.desc: The Battle of the Gothic Line in 1944.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of the Bulge (December 1944)
programme.desc: The December 1944 battle pitting American forces against German Panzer divisions in the Ardennes Forest.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Mount Hot Rocks (February 19, 1945)
programme.desc: American forces landing on the shores of Iwo Jima encounter Japanese combatants willing to fight to the death.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Remagen
programme.desc: German forces retreat across the Rhine on the Remagen bridge near the close of the war.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Okinawa
programme.desc: Kamikaze pilots guard the island of Okinawa from American forces.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: In 1945, Soviet and American troops press Hitler's armies from the west and the east, culminating in the fall of Berlin.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Commerce Raiders
programme.desc: Heavily armed vessels disguised as ordinary cargo ships patrolled allied waters, sinking supply boats and stealing their content.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Bombing of Germany
programme.desc: The development of the B-17 bomber, which allowed American planes to reach inside Germany and bomb its cities.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: U-Boat War
programme.desc: U-boats posed the deadliest threat to Allied convoys traveling the Atlantic.

programme.title: 1917 - The Real Story
programme.desc: Documentary of the True Story behind the International Blockbuster Film \\"1917\\" . Insight into the story behind the film. The real-life characters and what became of them.

programme.title: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: To commemorate the 70th Anniversary of the Battle of Britain Ewan and Colin McGregor take to the skies to discover how; against the odds, the RAF inflicted Hitler's first defeat of WW2.

programme.title: D-Day: Secret Raids That Won The War
programme.desc: Examining the RAF 617 squadron and their history of operations throughout the war.

programme.title: How Britain Won WW2
programme.desc: Hidden events that changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: A Day of Infamy
programme.desc: December 7th, 1941 Pearl Harbor was attacked by the Empire of Japan. Now the people who were there share their memories of that fateful day.

programme.title: Anzacs: In The Face Of War
programme.desc: 'ANZACS In the Face of War' presents an historical profile of Australia and new Zealand at the outbreak of war. The legacy of WWI the shared experiences and expectations of WWII.

programme.title: VE Day - Forever in their Debt
programme.desc: Tells the stories of those who experienced the end of the war in all its many forms. It features a wide range of interviews from children who remember the street parties, to the servicemen who remember not having to buy a single drink that day.

programme.title: Battle of Britain - Empty Skies
programme.desc: Tells the story of 19 men and women who were there. Through a series of filmed interviews their stories have been preserved, allowing them to tell the part they played in the nation's defence in their own words creating a unique collection of accounts.

programme.title: D-Day: The Shortest Day
programme.desc: Life, said the survivors, was never quite the same again, after June 6th 1944. With testimony from the UK, the US, the Commonwealth and Germany, The Shortest Day documents the meticulous planning leading up to the world’s biggest amphibious invasion.

programme.title: 1917 - The Real Story
programme.desc: Documentary of the True Story behind the International Blockbuster Film \\"1917\\" . Insight into the story behind the film. The real-life characters and what became of them.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rico & Ja'Mari
programme.desc: Rico wants to move to England to care for his ailing mother, but his intense online relationship with Ja'mari, an international male model, is giving him second thoughts about leaving. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah? (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Felipe & Jasmine
programme.desc: Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aaliyah & Alicia
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rod & Ebony
programme.desc: Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time? (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny & Jamison
programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true? (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Brittany finds love online with Bryon, a marine who may get deployed again to Iraq, she seeks Nev and Max's help before she runs out of time to discover if the perfect military man is real.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dorion & Jeszica
programme.desc: Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures? (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Stephanie & David
programme.desc: Catfish brings together couples who've interacted solely through screens. In this edition, Stephanie searches for the man she's been talking to in an unseen episode.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis & Jess
programme.desc: Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antwane & Tony
programme.desc: Nev and Max are contacted by Carmen who is sounding the alarm on behalf of her cousin, Antwane. He's been in a three-year romance with a man named Tony that he met on a telephone chat line.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny & Jamison
programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren & Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek online years ago. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend. Lauren thinks Derek could be the one, so why has he avoided meeting her?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rod & Ebony
programme.desc: Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Bianca & Brogan
programme.desc: When Brogan disappears from the Internet, then returns online after a year without question, Bianca wants to know what happened in the missing year.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesse & Brian
programme.desc: Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Thad & Sara
programme.desc: Thaddius sought refuge from his struggling marriage through an online relationship with Sara. When she starts telling tales of seizures and kidnappings, he starts to question her identity. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney & Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on a LGBT website four years ago and is head-over-heels in love. Brenell refuses to video chat with her, and Whitney is desperate to know why. Nev and Max investigate. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rico & Ja'Mari
programme.desc: Rico wants to move to England to care for his ailing mother, but his intense online relationship with Ja'mari, an international male model, is giving him second thoughts about leaving.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick & Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies?

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: Joeys insecurities get the better of him when Lorena wants to make sweet music with Patrick. David finally apologises to Lateysha and there's a shock double 'Ex' arrival down at the beach.

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Calum's Choice
programme.desc: The TOT makes Calum send one of his exes home, Georgia gets emotional with Ashley, Michael and Ellie become closer 'friends' and there's a surprise celebrity on the horizon.

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Miles And The Mob Wife
programme.desc: Miles, the new celebrity makes quite an impression on Marissa. David gets a double dressing down and the girls have a tough decision to make.

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: As One Door Closes Another One Opens
programme.desc: One of the boys get sent home leaving the girls in tears. It all gets too much for one of the original eight. Sophie may have finally met the man of her dreams.
programme.sub-title: As One Door Closes Another One Opens

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Mob Wife Goes In
programme.desc: Georgia and Miles get closer but will it all end in tears? Marissa is pushed to her 'mob wife' limits, and Joey and Lorena head down to the beach for the final arrival!

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Finale
programme.desc: Joey gets the shock of his life. An ex makes a spectacular return for the grand finale. Georgia gets emotional but will she get her happy ending along with all the other couples?

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Celeb Surprises
programme.desc: Eight hot, love hungry, celebs meet in their new villa for the first time. Kori see's a familiar face while Mike takes his celeb crush on a date. But, there's one more surprise in store! (S2, ep1)

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Love Triangle
programme.desc: Kaz and ex Theo make up but for how long... Kori and Sofie get closer before KC puts it on him and Nathan gets riled up by a revelation! (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 113
programme.desc: Kris tries to woo his best friend Lauren with a special love song. Rachel musters the courage to tell Billy how she really feels.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 114
programme.desc: Bryan and Megan have been best friends for 10 years and he can no longer keep his feeling contained. Kenise thinks that she and James can be more than workout buddies.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 115
programme.desc: Arty Krystal confesses her love to unsuspecting friend Nishell. Mike tells gal pal Rachel that he's in love with her.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 116
programme.desc: Alex tells his best friend's sister that he has strong feelings for her. Asha tells her friend Chris that she wants more than friendship.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 117
programme.desc: Aja confesses her feelings to best friend Charles. Paulie tries to convince his friend Bethany that there is more between them that just friendship!

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 118
programme.desc: Danielle loves to laugh and joke with Chris, but now she wants to get serious with him. Jenni met Christie about a year ago and now she's ready to bare her heart.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 119
programme.desc: Nicole wants to make her best friend of a year and a half her boyfriend. Andrew and Sarah have been friends for 5 years now he's ready to reveal his true feelings.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 120
programme.desc: Franklin needs to let Erica, his friend of 5 years, know how he really feels about her. Wayne, a rapper, reveals his true feelings to Megan.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 121
programme.desc: Ladies man, Sid, must put aside his pimping ways to tell his best friend Courtney how he feels. Scott let's best friend Laruen know he wants to take it to the next level.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 122
programme.desc: Melita must tell Marcus how she feels before he leaves for the military. Gaming nerd Brian, tells Samantha that he's in love with her.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 201
programme.desc: Yohamna is in love with her best friend James. Joe can't wait to let his best friend Lacey know he has feelings for her.

programme.title: The Hills: You Did This / It's About Trust
programme.desc: Lauren is enraged to learn that Audrina believed speculation that she and Justin were involved with each other. Heidi struggles balancing her relationships with Holly and Spencer. (S4, ep16)
programme.sub-title: You Did This / It's About Trust

programme.title: The Hills: Dream Boy, Dream Job / Mr. & Mrs. Pratt
programme.desc: Whitney gets offered a chance at her dream job in New York. Lauren grows nostalgic when she learns her parents are selling their house in Laguna Beach. (S4, ep18)
programme.sub-title: Dream Boy, Dream Job / Mr. & Mrs. Pratt

programme.title: The Hills: I Heidi Take Thee Spencer / Don't Cry On Your Birthday
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Justin shocks Audrina by whisking her away to Palm Springs! Last in the series. (S4, ep20)
programme.sub-title: I Heidi Take Thee Spencer / Don't Cry On Your Birthday

programme.title: The Hills: New City, New Drama
programme.desc: Lauren moves from Laguna Beach to Los Angeles for an internship at Teen Vogue, and fashion school. Can she juggle work, school, partying, and all of the drama that will follow? (S1, ep1)

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Lauren has to face her boss after the party. Meanwhile, Heidi doesn't take school seriously and makes different plans for her future. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The City: The British Are Coming
programme.desc: Olivia's flubs during Fashion Week leave an opening that Erin quickly tries to fill with a new fashion reporter. Roxy impresses Kelly by helping to produce a huge fashion show. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The City: Work Horses And Show Ponies
programme.desc: Whitney and Roxy fly to Miami to put on a fashion show for Whitney's clothing line, without Kelly's help! Olivia fights for her job by scoring an interview with Zac Posen. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: The City: One Girl's Trash...
programme.desc: After a successful showing of her line, Whitney's first big sale almost ends in disaster. Erin thinks Olivia is taking undue credit for pulling the perfect look for an ELLE shoot. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: The City: Stage Fight
programme.desc: Roxy & Whitney have a falling out when Roxy dresses a new musician in Whitney's clothing. Erin gains a spot on the Martha Stewart Show & needs Olivia's help to make it a success. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: The City: Roommate Wanted
programme.desc: Roxy & Whitney continue to fight & Roxy looks for her own place. Olivia reluctantly interviews a celebrity wearing Whitney's line & Erin sees another opportunity to replace her. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death of a Dream
programme.desc: In 2002, dancer Catherine Woods went to New York in search of fame but became a stripper to pay the rent. She started seeing Paul Cortez while living with her ex-boyfriend David Haughn. In November 2005, she was murdered. The two men became suspects.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A report on the March 1988 murder of legendary racecar driver Mickey Thompson and his wife Trudy. Thompson’s sister is convinced that Michael Goodwin, her brother’s former partner, was the killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fight For The Truth
programme.desc: 17-year-old Marty Tankleff was convicted of murdering his adoptive parents in their home. Marty initially confessed, but quickly recanted. He has fought for years for his innocence, as new witnesses have surfaced who could potentially exonerate him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Buried Secrets of Las Vegas
programme.desc: A report on the death of gaming tycoon Ted Binion, who was found dead in his Las Vegas home. Paranoid about his wealth, he stashed millions of dollars’ worth of silver in a hidden vault in Pahrump, Nevada.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Sugar Land Conspiracy
programme.desc: In December 2003, the Whitaker family-- Kent, his wife Tricia, and their sons, Bart and Kevin-- returned home from dinner. Upon entering the house, Kevin and Tricia were fatally shot. The investigation revealed that the murders had been planned by Bart.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadly Prophecy
programme.desc: Faylene Eaves, divorced Arizona mother of two, married Doug Grant, a divorced single dad, in 1993. They were both Mormons. Faylene had revelations from God that could have contributed to her death, however her husband was found guilty of murdering her.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Kidnap on Highway 1
programme.desc: In November 2007, the Hall family was driving back to California from Mexico, when they were pulled over by what they thought were police. They were kidnappers who drove them onto a dirt road in the mountains where trouble ensued.
programme.sub-title: Live to Tell: Kidnap on Highway 1

programme.title: 48 Hours: Their Father, The Godfather
programme.desc: In an exclusive interview, and for the first time, three of the children of the late crime boss John Gotti discuss the life they experienced growing up as members of his family, how they were sheltered from an awareness of Gotti’s lifestyle.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Taken: The Amber Dubois Story
programme.desc: A report on the February 2009 disappearance of Amber Dubois, just blocks from Escondido High School in California. 48 HOURS examines the permanent impact her disappearance has had on her family, even after the discovery and conviction of the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ghosts of Greenwich
programme.desc: A report on the murder of 15-year-old Martha Moxley in Greenwich, Connecticut and the new developments in Kennedy family member Michael Skakel’s efforts to overturn his 2002 murder conviction of Moxley.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live To Tell: River's Edge
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Follow the Money
programme.desc: In April 2006, Andrew Kissel, a real estate mogul who had embezzled more than $40 million, was found tied up and stabbed to death in the basement of his Greenwich, Connecticut mansion, just days before he was to plead guilty for his crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: A report on the 26-year effort of Bruce Lisker to overturn his conviction for the murder of his mother. In March 1983, 17-year-old Bruce Lisker called 911 to tell police that he had found his mother, Dorka Lisker, beaten severely and stabbed in her home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Body of Lies
programme.desc: In 2006, 31-year-old Leisha Hurst, while attending Barstow College, began dating fellow student, 34-year-old Jeami Chiapulis. Chiapulis seemed to be the man she could settle down with. The couple had plans to marry when Hurst vanished on January 22, 2009

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation
programme.desc: In June 2007, Dewayne Barrentine met Tausha Fields and soon after they began living together. Tausha told him some unbelievable stories about herself – leading Barrentine to verify her stories online, which resulted in the uncovering of a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The One Who Got Away
programme.desc: A report about how serial killer Andrew Urdiales was identified, arrested and convicted, and about the young woman who became the only one of his victims to survive.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Full Moon
programme.desc: In August 1996, Yvette Rodier and Zach Snarr went to the mountains for their date to take photos of the full moon, when a stranger drove up, pulled out a gun and opened fire. Zach was killed. Yvette, shot four times, survived by pretending to be dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fatal Choice
programme.desc: In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance for Justice
programme.desc: A report on the 1980 murder of Marilyn McIntyre, who was found dead in her home. Her husband, Lane, had returned home from work that morning and found her body. As police checked into his alibi, he named his friend Curt Forbes as a potential suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Amanda Knox: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The story of Amanda Knox, an American exchange student who was convicted, along with her Italian boyfriend, Raffaelle Sollecito, of murdering Amanda’s British roommate, Meredith Kercher in 2007.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A World of Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an "International Fair" on the playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Big Garden - Get Happy
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the kids to play with her instead of working in their garden. They promise to play with her as soon as they finish. Baby Bop can't wait, and tries many ways to get them to come play with her now, none of which work.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sharing Is Caring!
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes

programme.sub-title: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!

programme.sub-title: This Way In, This Way Out!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three kids try to build a pretend farm with disastrous results because they won't work together. Barney and his friends try to cheer up Olivia.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Safe Home
programme.desc: Safety first! After learning about fire safety when a firefighter visits the caboose, Barney and his friends are inspired to do a little "safety inspection" of their own.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is disappointed when their trip to the zoo is postponed. Barney tells Baby Bop a tale about keeping your promise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop meets a new girl named Jill who doesn’t want to join the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big As Barney - The Chase
programme.desc: When Ryan notices how much everyone loves Barney, he tries to be just like him; but he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Then Ryan learns that he is special when he's just being himself!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Numbers! Numbers!
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's A Happy Day!
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it./Barney and Baby Bop are thrilled when BJ sets up a bug zoo in the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Fountain of Fun
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big Brother Rusty
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Coming on Strong
programme.desc: Exercise is good for everybody and every body! From running to touching toes to jumping jacks to some favorite songs and games, Barney and his friends grow strong while having fun with exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race./When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Look What I Can Do
programme.desc: Barney's friends are playing a fun game of "I Can Do" where they each share something they can do. When BJ suggests having an "I Can Do" show, Baby Bop becomes worried.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Good Egg
programme.desc: When the kids find a mysterious, colorful egg in the park, Barney takes them on a trip to Kenya to try to find out what kind of animal could have laid the egg.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Labour And Love
programme.desc: More tears, tiffs and true love in Teen Mom UK. Megan has a baby, Amber has a meltdown, and romance is in the air for Mia. Sassi celebrates her 1st Mother's Day and Chloe tackles her weight. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Lads Trip
programme.desc: Megan welcomes a new addition to the family... a horse! Chloe heads to the gym while Jordan heads to Amsterdam. There are fireworks for Amber and Ste, and Sassi plans a Christening. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Piece of Me
programme.desc: Kail celebrates Isaac's birthday while life-changing news weighs on her. Leah reveals secrets about her past. Chelsea tries to change Aubree's visitation agreement with Adam's parents. (S10, ep9)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Do Something
programme.desc: The coronavirus threatens Leah's travel plans and brings up serious concerns for Ali's health. Briana holds a summit with Devoin and Luis to insist they take on financial responsibility. (S10, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Until the World Ends
programme.desc: The threat of coronavirus intensifies as Chelsea travels for work. Leah and the girls go into self-quarantine to protect Ali. Briana's new fling has the potential for major heartbreak. (S10, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Remote Control
programme.desc: Despite quarantine, Leah's book release pushes her and Jeremy to confront their past. Jade is forced to close her salon during lockdown. (S10, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Not So Normal Times
programme.desc: As the country emerges from quarantine, Briana struggles with the decision to send Nova back to school. Kail and Jo struggle with the decision to let Isaac have more say. (S10, ep13)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bizarre New World
programme.desc: Kail gives birth to her 4th child. Chelsea worries about her health amid Cole's COVID-19 scare. Briana and Devoin fight about finances. Jade calls Sean out for being unmotivated. (S10, ep14)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Tongue-tied
programme.desc: Tensions erupt between Jade and Sean at Kloie's birthday dinner. After their intense text fight, Briana tries to put aside her anger with Devoin for Nova's birthday. (S10, ep15)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Say OK
programme.desc: Jade's frustrations force her to break up with Sean. Kailyn tries to co-parent through the stress of virtual learning. Chelsea gets busier as COVID-19 numbers spike in South Dakota. (S10, ep16)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Just Don't Sink It
programme.desc: Leah steps in when tensions between the twins boil over. Kailyn is forced to navigate the fallout of strong statements she made about Javi. (S10, ep17)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Under The Big Top
programme.desc: Chelsea makes a difficult decision about her future. Leah withdraws Gracie from cheer in order to keep Ali safe. Jade deals with Sean's messes after he breaks her window. (S10, ep18)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Spring Has Sprung
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley takes an anniversary trip with her boyfriend. Leah receives life altering news about her health. Kail says goodbye to her old house and bittersweet memories. (S10, ep22)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley gives Bar an answer. Luis asks to see Stella for the first time in months, forcing Bri to decide what is truly best for her daughter. (S10, ep23)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Level Up

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Not Quite
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut Sean proposes, but Jade's not sure how to respond. Leah is forced into quarantine when Jeremy tests positive for covid. Briana introduces her man to the cameras. (S10, ep25)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Full Circle
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade decides to get plastic surgery in Miami, so Briana visits to coach her through her anxiety. Bar goes to court for his outstanding DUI charges. (S10, ep26)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: MIA

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Cut Out
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a decision about her family. Kail juggles three different co-parenting relationships. (S10, ep30)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Summer
programme.desc: Summer's mum has struggled with addiction. Summer wants her mum in her life, but can she believe her promises of being sober and there for her and the baby?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Karley

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Aleah
programme.desc: Aleah met her boyfriend Shawn in a juvenile detention centre. Now they live together and Aleah is pregnant with health worries. Will the couple be able to cope?

programme.desc: Jazmin was a motivated teenager from a strict family. She fell in love with Dell and got pregnant at 17. Can she gain back her parents' trust and allow Dell to spend time with their baby?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Savon

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Courtney
programme.desc: Pregnant Courtney has decided to reclaim her abstinence - which leaves her boyfriend Scott feeling frustrated and alone. Will their relationship survive Courtney's born-again virgin stance?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Savannah
programme.desc: Savannah had a difficult upbringing and relied on her boyfriend Stone for support. But after finding out she was pregnant, they soon split! Will they be able to co-parent as friends?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Madisen

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Rachelle

programme.desc: Camryn met Cam when she was 14. His personality often put him at odds with her mum, but after finding out Camryn was pregnant and losing his job due to COVID, he was forced into moving in.

programme.desc: Kash has been with boyfriend Nate for a year but struggles with his immaturity. Kash has to see if Nate can handle these new adult responsibilities or if he's just not ready to get serious.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Redemption
programme.desc: A death row inmate's final request brings Hawkes to a Pennsylvania prison and face-to-face with a personal secret just as a prison riot erupts.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Can You Hear Me Now?
programme.desc: A murder on the Statue of Liberty rattles New York City as the CSI team tries to catch the killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Deep
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a professional diver in relation to a rumor of sunken treasure in the New York Harbor.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Rest in Peace Marina Garito
programme.desc: Sid rules the death of a woman whose twin brother disappeared 15 years ago a suicide, but Stella is convinced that he is wrong and sets out to prove it.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Redemption
programme.desc: Dr. Hawkes is trapped in a cell block during a security breach orchestrated by a familiar face from CSI's past, and the only person who can help him get to safety is the death row inmate who murdered his sister.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: A teen is critically injured after being shot in an alleyway. The victim's younger brother witnessed the crime, but he cannot give an accurate description of the incident and shooter to the police.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Point of View
programme.desc: A murder is connected to suspicious behavior that Mac spies from his apartment while recovering from an injury, and his ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll may be connected to the case.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Deep
programme.desc: A sailboat race to Staten Island takes an unexpected tack when one of the boats nearly collides with a dead scuba diving instructor.

programme.title: CSI: New York: You Only Die Once

programme.title: CSI: New York: Buzzkill
programme.desc: When a supermodel is found dead in a giant martini glass on a Times Square billboard, Stella and Lindsay follow the evidence in search of the party crasher.

programme.desc: Mac, Danny and Hawkes investigates a groom murdered on his wedding day, found stuffed and wrapped like a wedding present. Stella and Lindsay investigate when a jigsaw covered in blood is left on Stella's car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Happily Never After
programme.desc: A notorious hotel owner known for her meanness is found dead under an ice sculpture, and the clues to the death of a second woman who fell to her death onto a school bus can be found in the book "Peter Pan."

programme.title: CSI: New York: Personal Foul
programme.desc: As the search for the "Cabbie Killer" continues, riding a cab gets very deadly. The team must figure out how to keep New York City safe.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Triple Threat

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Bloodline
programme.desc: Horatio suspects that the County Supervisor and the owners of a nearby Native American Casino may be involved when a murder victim is found scalped.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Just Murdered

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Burned

programme.desc: The murder of a young socialite could be connected to a death pool, an offshore gambling boat, and a counterfeiting ring.

programme.desc: Wolfe believes that he may have triggered a Santeria curse when he disturbs a miniature coffin at a murder scene.

programme.desc: The investigation into a beheading during a stunt at an automobile "sideshow" could ultimately expose a larger cover-up involving stolen cars and jet fuel.

programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.desc: Holly sneaks into a sorority Eden is pledging to find out why she was rejected years ago. Haskell turns the guys' apartment into a pretend AirBnB to attract a woman.

programme.desc: Holly, over the moon, introduces the gang to her new boyfriend, Congressman Charles Hayward, but they soon begin to question his motives.

programme.desc: Holly, tired of all the drama that comes with dating, decides to only pursue men she’s not interested in. Haskell takes all his money out of the bank to show it off.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart recruits Phil for his a cappella group and Phil leads a rebellion. Haskell leaves Holly out of his will and she seeks revenge.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s sister Nicki comes back from her European vacation with a female lover. Holly, inspired by Nicki, decides to try dating women.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s stint on a movie set leads to romance with the female star. Holly struggles with having to fire someone for the first time.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil makes a big mistake on his first date with a movie star so Holly has to infiltrate the red carpet to bail him out. Stuart and Haskell compete over who can get the most Twitter followers.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Stuart have a fight with Haskell and he moves out. Holly, desperate to keep them all together, sends Phil and Stuart to bring him home.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidently convinces Stuart to quit his dental practice and buy a restaurant. Haskell, sick of paying alimony, tries to persuade his ex wife Margo to marry her fiancé.

programme.desc: Stuart and Holly convince Margo to hold her wedding at their restaurant. Haskell, still desperately in love with Margo, tries to stop it.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit, because he used Phil’s (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s (David Alan Basche) work life is turned upside down when Phil (Donald Faison) sleeps with his dental assistant. Holly (Kristen Johnston) lends Eden (Kelly Stables) some outfits and soon discovers her clothes have a better social life than her.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart’s favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil’s ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school.

programme.desc: Their fairy-tale turns grim when her godson kills houseplants she has nurtured for over fifty years and named after friends the plants outlived; Judge Rhonda tries to revive this garden massacre.

programme.desc: A husband's affair with his wife's cousin is revealed when a valuable collection is stolen from their car and Judge Rhonda settles the score.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 39
programme.desc: A 20 year old car drives the anger between one sister and the other who has suffered a traumatic brain injury; Judge Rhonda presides.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 59
programme.desc: Best friends slated to become sisters-in-law end up in Judge Rhonda's court over a car wreck after a night of heavy drinking.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 13
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda digs through the mud when cousins feud over a 4- wheeler that was shredded in the woods.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 8
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda decides if his cousin should pay for a young man's bicep augmentation surgery.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 54
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda hears the case of a convenience store stop for a drink that leaves a car in a mangled mess and the relationship between brothers-in-law on ice.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 96
programme.desc: Sisters who share a rollercoaster existance of ups and downs traded their beloved dog Mini and now that both are stable they need Judge Rhonda to decide who will provide Mini's forever home.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 74
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces a family in crisis over nude pictures and a mother's restraining order against her son's fiancee.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 61
programme.desc: A Mom on her last nerve with her lazy, unemployed son and his boyfriend comes to Judge Rhonda's court with a banged-up car and a plea for help.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 42
programme.desc: Cousins cross swords over a trip to the Hawaiian paradice that one claims was a long planned Birthday celebration and the other tells Judge Rhonda she received no details, so she didn't go.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 25
programme.desc: Sisters squabble over a loan to renovate a new film studio and drag their brother with them into Judge Rhonda's Court.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 20
programme.desc: Brothers face the music, actually Hip Hop Jazz from an Alto Sax, over a loan for studio gear in Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 73
programme.desc: A motorcycle crash drives two close cousins into Judge Rhonda's courtroom because the younger one who "just wanted to be like Joe" could not keep up.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 69
programme.desc: A model says her cousin/manager is a thought out thief and Judge Rhonda must decide if his "extra" 20% commission is justified by her demands.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces a family in crisis; mom and step dad claim their daughter is mentally unstable, uses drugs and steals from their company.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 30
programme.desc: Sisters who fall into financial ruin over a car purchased so one of them can visit her murdered son's grave bring the case to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 52
programme.desc: A tattoo "addiction" has drawn out the conflict between an older woman and her estranged young husband; Judge Rhonda inks them a solution.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 6
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda navigates the dispute between an estranged step-father and a grieving son over his late mother's custom motorcycle.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 70
programme.desc: When Sassy the dog turns up missing after a night filled with old and new boyfriends, Judge Rhonda faces former sisters-inlaw growling with anger and grief.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sisters in crisis: Judge Rhonda helps a family fight a path through drug addiction.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 9
programme.desc: Brothers in the flooring business try to convince Judge Rhonda that cutting vinyl is harder than laying carpet.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 58
programme.desc: When her cousin got out of jail on a theft charge, she tells Judge Rhonda that the list of what he owes her for rent, a cell phone, and her wrecked car is almost as long as his rap sheet.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Cousins who work together, put together a "Stop the Violence" event to help kids, but when that failed it started an argument that won't stop until they face Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 118
programme.desc: Cousins clash over an expensive Massage chair that was ruined because one of them was falling down drunk.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 149
programme.desc: When her younger cousin fell on hard times and needed money for a car, this woman dug into her pockets and handed over thousands of dollars which, to Judge Rhonda's surprise, was used as a down payment on a fancy luxury vehicle.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A business woman with a thriving eyelash clientel claims her cousin has used her like a private ATM; Judge Rhonda probes both parties to see who will blink first.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 44
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda entertains a Rap Battle as a unique form of testimony in a case between cousins who have lost their harmony.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 34
programme.desc: A smoking Truck, worn out brakes and a muddy, rain slicked, dirt road drive a brother and sister straight to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 112
programme.desc: When a cousin's ex becomes his new boyfriend, Judge Rhonda has to sort through the mess of loans, baby supplies, broken car windows, burned up pies and a cut up wig.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 18
programme.desc: Will a Cheeseburger run end an engagement? Judge Rhonda presides.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda tries to tie cousins back together who are at the end of their rope when expensive rock climbing equipment seems to fall off a cliff.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 12
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces a clash of biblical proportion when a Pastor claims his sister stole $5,000 from his church.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 81
programme.desc: Sisters who only found each other when they were grown up are now at war over merchandise one "grabs real quick" from the other's boutique and Judge Rhonda has to settle the tab.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 82
programme.desc: Designer sunglasses that look really "fly" divide two cousins, inseparable since birth, because they might be fake; Judge Rhonda shines sunlight on the truth.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Recipe For Murder
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the grisly meat grinder murder at a slaughterhouse.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Got Murder?
programme.desc: Some bird watchers find a raven with a human eyeball in its mouth. Warrick and Grissom look into the circumstances of David's unusual and first autopsy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Random Acts Of Violence
programme.desc: Warrick investigates the drive by murder of a young girl in his old neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: One Hit Wonder
programme.desc: Catherine takes the point in the investigation of an escalating series of peeping tom incidents.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Lady Heather's Box
programme.desc: Warrick and Grissom investigate the death of a man found at a foam party.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Lucky Strike
programme.desc: A man driving with a wooden stake in his head dies in front of a casino.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crash and Burn
programme.desc: An elderly woman crashes her car into a crowded restaurant. One of the patrons is Sara's paramedic boyfriend. Grissom and Nick investigate the possible carbon monoxide murder of a woman in her home.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Primum Non Nocere
programme.desc: An ice hockey player dies during a game.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Felonius Monk
programme.desc: Grissom studies Ananda's Vegas Buddhist monastery where four Thai monks were fatally shot in the forehead. Forensics also show the presence of hostile restaurant owner Peter Hutchins Sr. and his son, Pete Jr.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chasing The Bus
programme.desc: A tour bus heading to Las Vegas skids off the highway, leading to many deaths and even more injuries. The team suspects that this was no mere accident.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cats In The Cradle
programme.desc: An old lady is found dead with a stab wound in her chest. There are over 20 cats in her house.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Anatomy Of A Lye
programme.desc: Grissom and Sidle investigate the death of someone who was buried in a shallow grave in a park and covered in lye.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cross-jurisdictions
programme.desc: An ex-CSI chief is murdered in his house after a wild party for the rich and famous. His wife and young daughter are taken hostage in Miami. Catherine and Warrick follow the trail and work with Caine and his team to solve the case

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Hunger Artist
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found in a shopping cart, wrapped in a blanket with her mutilated face protruding out. The woman was a model named Ashley James whose face can be found all over Las Vegas, on billboards and magazine covers.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Revenge Is Best Served Cold
programme.desc: A world-famous poker champion drops dead in the middle of a game. He appears to have had a heart attack. Outside of the city, Nick and Catherine investigate the death of a young street racer.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Accused Is Entitled
programme.desc: Hollywood sex symbol Tom Haviland admits to having sex with a girl who is found dead in his casino hotel bedroom with her throat fatally pierced with a corkscrew. His lawyer demands a near-instant trial, leaving CSI almost no time to work.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Let The Seller Beware
programme.desc: The owners of a house placed on sale are found dead, their bodies discovered by two interested buyers. Sara is working solo on the death of a cheerleader at a high school.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Little Murder
programme.desc: A dwarf is found dead, hanged in an auditorium during an annual convention for little people. Working on a case of murder during a home invasion, Catherine is attacked by the perpetrator while processing the scene.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Abra Cadaver
programme.desc: During a magic show, a female participant really disappears during a disappearing act. Nick and Catherine investigates the death of a rock star found on his tour bus with a needle stuck in his arm.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fight Night
programme.desc: When boxing favourite LaRoi Steele dies during the Fight Night against Javier Molina, Grissom investigates for a possible murder. Meanwhile, Nick is assigned to work solo on a jewelry heist.
